    Index

    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    O

    onConnected(String) - Method in class chat.app.ChatApp
     
    onConnected(String) - Method in interface chat.app.ChatView
    Notifies that the client has successfully connected and logged in.
    onDisconnected() - Method in class chat.app.ChatApp
     
    onDisconnected() - Method in interface chat.app.ChatView
    Notifies that the underlying connection has been closed or lost.
    onError(String) - Method in class chat.app.ChatApp
     
    onError(String) - Method in interface chat.app.ChatView
    Reports an error message emitted by the server or client.
    onPrivateMessage(String, String, String) - Method in class chat.app.ChatApp
     
    onPrivateMessage(String, String, String) - Method in interface chat.app.ChatView
    Delivers a private (direct) message.
    onPublicMessage(String, String) - Method in class chat.app.ChatApp
     
    onPublicMessage(String, String) - Method in interface chat.app.ChatView
    Delivers a public message that was broadcast to everyone.
    onSystemMessage(String) - Method in class chat.app.ChatApp
     
    onSystemMessage(String) - Method in interface chat.app.ChatView
    Shows an informational/system message that does not originate from a user.
    onUsers(List) - Method in class chat.app.ChatApp
     
    onUsers(List) - Method in interface chat.app.ChatView
    Provides the current list of users connected to the server.
